categoryPage.faqSubtitle: Answers to common questions about this category

automazione_ai.q1: How long does it take to implement an automation?
automazione_ai.a1: A simple workflow takes 3-5 days, a complex one with AI chatbot and multiple integrations 2-4 weeks.
automazione_ai.q2: How is the chatbot trained on my data?
automazione_ai.a2: We use RAG technology to index your documents, FAQs and knowledge base. The chatbot learns from your specific content and answers with precise information.
automazione_ai.q3: Do I need to pay for additional software licenses?
automazione_ai.a3: n8n is open-source and we host it. For AI agents we use cost-optimized models. We discuss everything during the free call.

vendite_lead_gen.a1: We use public directories, LinkedIn, Google Maps and industry databases. All data is GDPR compliant.
vendite_lead_gen.q2: Are cold emails legal in Europe?
vendite_lead_gen.a2: Yes, cold emails are legal if they comply with GDPR regulations. We ensure every campaign is fully compliant.
vendite_lead_gen.q3: Does the CRM integrate with my existing tools?
vendite_lead_gen.a3: Yes, through our automations we connect Scaler CRM with any tool: email, social, analytics, billing and more.

marketing_digitale.q1: Do you manage both Meta Ads and Google Ads?
marketing_digitale.a1: Yes, we manage campaigns on both platforms with AI optimization. We create the optimal multi-channel strategy for your business.
marketing_digitale.q2: How long does it take to see SEO results?
marketing_digitale.a2: First improvements are visible in 1-3 months. For significant ranking results, 3-6 months is the typical timeline.
marketing_digitale.q3: Do you also create content or just strategy?
marketing_digitale.a3: Both. We offer content strategy, AI copywriting, social media management and blog automation with automatic publishing.

consulenza_sviluppo.q1: How does the AI strategy consulting work?
consulenza_sviluppo.a1: We analyze your current processes, identify automation opportunities and create a roadmap with priorities and estimated ROI.
consulenza_sviluppo.q2: What technologies do you use for web development?
consulenza_sviluppo.a2: We use React/Next.js for web apps, Framer for high-impact visual sites, and integrate everything with your existing stack.
consulenza_sviluppo.q3: Do you offer training for my team?
consulenza_sviluppo.a3: Yes, we offer practical courses on AI tools and n8n automation. Sessions of 2-4 hours with educational material and post-course support.

default.q1: How does the work process look?
default.a1: 1) Discovery call, 2) Needs analysis, 3) Proposal and timeline, 4) Implementation, 5) Training and support.
default.a2: Yes, all our projects include a support period. We also offer monthly maintenance plans.
default.q3: Can I see examples of previous work?
default.a3: Of course, during the free call we show relevant case studies and demos for your industry.

process.title: How It Works
process.subtitle: From idea to results in 3 simple steps
process.step1Desc: In our intro call, we learn about your processes, what you've tried, and your real challenges — operations, client acquisition, or both.
process.step2Desc: We propose the ideal service mix for your case: automation, marketing, lead generation or consulting. Every project is different.
process.step3Desc: We implement, monitor and continuously optimize. Your business grows with solutions that work for you.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about our services

items.q1: How long does it take to implement an automation?
items.a1: It depends on complexity. Simple automations are ready in 3-5 days, complex ones in 2-4 weeks. During the free call we define precise timelines.
items.a2: Absolutely not. We handle everything from design to implementation. We train you on using the final tools.
items.a3: On average our clients see a 300% increase in productivity and save 40+ hours per month on repetitive tasks.
items.a4: Yes, all our plans include ongoing support. We monitor automations and optimize them over time.
items.q5: How does the onboarding process work?
items.a5: 1) Free discovery call, 2) Process analysis, 3) Custom proposal, 4) Implementation, 5) Training and Go-live.
